variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Other external expenses', 'Cost of personnel', and 'Other operating expenses', and the notes indicate D&A was excluded from those selections. A separate operating D&A line exists, but it appears to be a total operating D&A amount spanning more than SG&A, with no SG&A-specific breakout. Because XRD is empty and no R&D line is shown, there is also no basis to isolate an R&D-related D&A subset. Conservative treatment is to leave XSGA_DA empty pending manual review rather than assign total operating D&A to SG&A.
